accurate.why: Correctly identifies expanded NIH fields, Centers of Excellence increase from five to seven, reauthorization through 2029, and appropriation figures.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; appropriation figures and provisions match bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies reauthorization and expansion of ASD programs through FY2029.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes reporting deadlines and specific conditions like the 'upon request' nature of technical assistance.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states reporting deadlines: within 2 years, within 4 years of Sept. 30, 2024, and annual reports.

concise.why: Bullet points for appropriations are efficient; no unnecessary padding.

correct_entities.why: NIH, HHS, PHSA, Indian Tribes correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: $28.1 million, $56.344 million, $306 million, and $22.74 billion FEMA figure are not present here; appropriation figures match bill.
